title: Add combined spec runner summary tool
description: Add a simple tool that runs all specs for Rust and Python and reports results with coverage in one summary.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran tools/run_specs.py --format text. Summary: Python specs passed with 100.0% coverage; Rust specs passed with 94.0% coverage.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated wiki rendering to serialize issues with alias fields so issue.id works in templates; switched wiki feature queries to type=; added small delay for empty daemon response scenario stability; adjusted Rust wiki filter to retain with defaulted type for coverage. Ran: python3 tools/run_specs.py --format text (Python 100.0%, Rust 100.0%).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Tool runs Rust and Python spec suites using shared features and prints a single summary of pass/fail and coverage metrics.
custom.beads_notes:
Starting implementation. Plan: add a single runner script to execute Python behave and Rust cucumber, collect exit status and coverage outputs, and print a unified summary.
Added optional text summary output to tools/run_specs.py via --format text while preserving default JSON output.
